summary: PARTI . General We are driving transformation at The Kraft Heinz Company (Nasdaq: KHC), inspired by our Purpose, Lets Make Life Delicious . Consumers are at the center of everything we do. With 2025 net sales of approximately $25 billion, we are committed to growing our iconic and emerging food and beverage brands on a global scale.
